query: As of today (July 1, 2026), is OpenAI's GPT-5.6 generally available, and is it scored/ranked on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index leaderboard (artificialanalysis.ai / DataLearner mirror), or is GPT-5.6 still only a government-gated limited preview announced June 26, 2026? Distinguish clearly between GPT-5.5 (released April 2026, scored on the leaderboard) and GPT-5.6 (limited preview). What is OpenAI's actual highest-scoring generally-available model on the AA Intelligence Index right now, and its score/rank?
answer:
## Summary

**GPT-5.6 is NOT generally available** as of July 1, 2026. It remains a **government-gated limited preview** announced June 26, 2026, restricted to ~20 trusted/government-approved partners via API and Codex. OpenAI itself says the models will become "generally available in the coming weeks."

**GPT-5.6 is NOT scored/ranked on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index** (nor the BenchLM/DataLearner-style mirror) — because it isn't publicly accessible for independent evaluation. Only OpenAI-reported benchmarks (e.g., Terminal-Bench 2.1) exist for it, which are not the AA Index.

**Clear distinction:**
- **GPT-5.5** (released April 23, 2026) → generally available, scored on the AA Index. Topped the index at launch, then was overtaken by Claude Opus 4.8.
- **GPT-5.6** (June 26, 2026) → limited preview only, unranked.

**OpenAI's highest-scoring generally-available model on the AA Intelligence Index right now is GPT-5.5**, currently **#2 overall** (behind Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8, the current #1). On the BenchLM mirror of the AA Index: Claude Opus 4.8 = 55.7% (#1), **GPT-5.5 = 54.8% (#2)**.

*Caveat:* exact index integers differ across mirrors due to scale normalization (raw ~56–61 points vs. percentage view ~54.8–55.7%) and max-mode variants, but the rank ordering is consistent.

sources.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
sources.snippet: We're beginning a limited preview of the GPT-5.6 series: Sol, Terra, Luna. Terra has competitive performance to GPT-5.5 while 2x cheaper.

sources.title: GPT-5.6 Preview System Card - OpenAI Deployment Safety Hub
sources.snippet: We plan to make GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna generally available in the coming weeks. As part of our ongoing engagement with the U.S. government, we previewed our plans.

sources.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request
sources.snippet: OpenAI is limiting the release of its newest AI models to a 'small group of trusted partners' at the behest of the U.S. government.

sources.title: OpenAI Rolls Out Powerful New GPT-5.6 Models—But Limits Users After Government Request
sources.snippet: Advanced technology only available to select 'trusted partners' at the request of the U.S. government ahead of a larger rollout.

sources.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.6 models to 20 partners, public launch expected by July 2026
sources.snippet: Release on June 26, 2026 was limited to 20 trusted partners and involved coordination with the U.S. government.

sources.title: GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra & Luna — Benchmarks, Pricing & Limited Preview (June 2026)
sources.snippet: Limited preview only. NOT scored on Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index. Previewed June 26, 2026 to ~20 government-approved partners; wider release 'in the coming weeks.'

sources.title: Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index Benchmark 2026: 136 model averages
sources.snippet: Claude Opus 4.8 leads the public snapshot at 55.7%, followed by GPT-5.5 (54.8%) and Claude Opus 4.7 (Adaptive) (53.5%). GPT-5.6 is not listed.

sources.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 is the new leading AI model
sources.snippet: April 23, 2026: GPT-5.5 tops the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index by 3 points, breaking a three-way tie with Anthropic and Google.

sources.title: Best AI Models in July 2026: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini & Grok
sources.snippet: Claude Opus 4.8 holds #1 on the AA Intelligence Index; GPT-5.6 is in a gated preview limited to ~20 organizations as of June 26, 2026, not a consumer option.

sources.title: Best AI Models June 2026 — Top 10 by SWE-Bench, Pricing & Context
sources.snippet: Claude Opus 4.8: 56 on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index (max-mode); leads SWE-Bench at 88.6%, GPT-5.5 at 82.6%.

sources.title: OpenAI upgrading ChatGPT and Codex with new GPT-5.6 models in limited release
sources.snippet: GPT-5.6 introduced two months after GPT-5.5; rollout to customers won't be as straightforward as previous updates.

sources.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.6 in limited preview pending US government sign off
sources.snippet: First frontier models to launch since the US government sidelined Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5.

data_points.unit: not scored / not listed (count of leaderboard entries)

GPT-5.5 AA Intelligence Index (BenchLM mirror, #2 / highest OpenAI GA model)
Claude Opus 4.7 (Adaptive) AA Intelligence Index (BenchLM mirror, #3)
GPT-5.5 AA Intelligence Index at April 2026 launch (raw index)
Claude Opus 4.8 AA Intelligence Index (max-mode, alternate tracker)
